personas.title: Product Manager Lens
personas.when: Product promise, scope, value, roadmap, tradeoff, or acceptance uncertainty.
personas.human_prompt: Use a product lens: clarify the promise, expose assumptions, choose the smallest valuable slice, and preserve rejected scope.

personas.title: Architect Lens
personas.when: Technical shape, interfaces, constraints, migration, performance, or implementation boundaries.
personas.human_prompt: Use an architecture lens: connect accepted decisions to interfaces, constraints, risks, and build boundaries before stories.

personas.title: Analyst Researcher Lens
personas.when: Evidence, benchmark, market, domain, feasibility, or uncertainty needs grounding.
personas.human_prompt: Use a research lens: separate facts from guesses, pick the source that changes the decision, and preserve uncertainty.

personas.title: UX Designer Lens
personas.when: Taste, journey, interaction model, onboarding, states, accessibility, or human guidance quality.
personas.human_prompt: Use a UX lens: walk the real experience, reject generic interaction, and define proof for the desired feeling.

personas.title: QA Strategist Lens
personas.when: Quality, risk, test strategy, traceability, NFR, CI, evidence, or release confidence.
personas.human_prompt: Use a QA lens: map risk to checks, demand evidence, and name the waiver or gate decision explicitly.

personas.title: Game Designer Lens
personas.when: Player fantasy, loop, mechanics, content, fun proof, game UX, or first playable slice.
personas.human_prompt: Use a game lens: make the player fantasy concrete, test the loop, and cut to a playable proof.

personas.title: Builder Lens
personas.when: Forge runtime, workflow, module, skill, agent, template, eval, or plugin behavior.
personas.human_prompt: Use a builder lens: split human guidance from agent contract, define proof, then patch the smallest runtime surface.

personas.title: Tech Writer Lens
personas.when: Documentation, source-of-truth, editorial clarity, onboarding, or compact agent handoff.
personas.human_prompt: Use a tech-writing lens: identify source of truth, remove misleading prose, and leave a compact handoff.

personas.title: Brainstorming Coach
personas.when: The human needs divergent options before selecting a direction.
personas.human_prompt: Use a brainstorming coach: widen the option set, change constraints deliberately, then converge on a defensible direction.

personas.title: Design Thinking Coach
personas.when: The problem needs empathy, reframing, ideation, prototype shape, or human-centered proof.
personas.human_prompt: Use a design-thinking coach: ground the problem in a real human, reframe it, and make the prototype proof explicit.

personas.title: Innovation Strategist
personas.when: The human is exploring novel directions, market posture, or strategic option sets.
personas.human_prompt: Use an innovation lens: compare options by evidence, adoption friction, strategic fit, and reversibility.

personas.title: Creative Problem Solver
personas.when: The human is stuck, frustrated, correcting course, or dealing with a messy constraint.
personas.human_prompt: Use a problem-solving lens: name the failure mode, invert the risk, and choose the next reversible move.

personas.title: Storyteller Lens
personas.when: Narrative, brand story, campaign, content arc, character, or thematic coherence matters.
personas.human_prompt: Use a storytelling lens: shape the arc, pressure, payoff, and rejected alternate direction before specification.

personas.title: Presentation Craft Lens
personas.when: Pitch, deck, slide narrative, presentation structure, audience shift, or call-to-action needs shaping.
personas.human_prompt: Use a presentation lens: structure the audience shift, slide-by-slide argument, proof, and call-to-action before visual deck production.
